display.purpose: Hero headlines. The single largest typographic moment.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Clear hierarchy below display.

body.purpose: All running prose. Line length capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Section headers, eyebrow text, technical labels. JetBrains Mono.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. Ease-out-quart.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Archive Amber fill, white text, zero radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.60 0.130 60); color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.130 60); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.130 60); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent, ink text, zero radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.91 0.008 70); padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.130 60); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Tertiary action. 1px border, transparent bg, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.91 0.008 70); padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: oklch(0.40 0 0); color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.60 0.130 60); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard container. Dark card bg, 1px border, zero radius.
components.html:
Repository

A canonical home for every production asset.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.10 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 0; padding: 40px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.5rem; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 16px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.91 0.008 70); margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input. Dark bg, 1px border, zero radius, amber focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.18 0 0); color: oklch(0.91 0.008 70); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 0; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.56 0.006 70); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.60 0.130 60); }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: JetBrains Mono uppercase label. Used for section eyebrows.
components.css: .ds-section-header { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.62 0.045 240); margin-bottom: 32px; }

components.name: Grid Separator
components.description: Grid pattern using 1px borders as structural separators.
components.css: .ds-grid-sep { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1px; background: oklch(0.22 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); } .ds-grid-cell { background: oklch(0.075 0 0); padding: 40px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.91 0.008 70); }

components.name: Comparison Row
components.description: Three-column comparison table row. Metric vs Without vs With.
components.html:
Finding the approved version
Guessed from filenames
Known, with certainty
components.css: .ds-compare-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); } .ds-compare-metric { padding: 24px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ffffff; } .ds-compare-without { padding: 24px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.56 0.006 70); border-left: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); } .ds-compare-with { padding: 24px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #ffffff; border-left: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); }

narrative.overview:
Portals is the memory layer of creative worlds. Its interface should feel like the physical archive of a world-class production studio — calm, precise, and built to outlast the work it preserves. Every surface communicates intentionality: nothing is decorative, nothing is accidental, nothing exists for 'vibe.' The system earns trust through structural honesty.

This is not a SaaS landing page. Not a DAM. Not a dashboard. The interface sits between Apple's craft precision and Linear's software rigor, with the quiet authority of a Pixar production pipeline. The metaphor is a studio archive — not a filing cabinet, not a command center.
keyCharacteristics: Brutalist structural honesty — zero radius, no shadows, 1px borders
Warmth through type and accent, not surface — achromatic background, amber brand anchor
Monospace as technical authority — JetBrains Mono for headers, metrics, data
Cinematic restraint — motion earns its place through function, not flourish
Structural hierarchy through borders — grid-gap-px as primary organizational tool

rules.name: The Archive Amber Rule
rules.body: The primary accent is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — when amber appears, it means something.

rules.name: The Achromatic Foundation Rule
rules.body: The background surface carries zero chroma. All brand warmth lives in the amber primary, the slate secondary, and the quality of the typography.

rules.name: The Mono Authority Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono appears only where precision is the message: section headers, metrics, data points, code references. It never carries body prose.

rules.name: The Display Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Display heading size never exceeds 4.5rem (~72px). Above that the page is shouting, not designing.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at all times. Shadows never appear — not on hover, not on focus, not on elevation. State changes are communicated through color shift, border emphasis, or tonal stepping.

dos: Do use 1px borders as the primary structural tool
Do use tonal stepping for depth hierarchy instead of shadows
Do use JetBrains Mono for section headers, metrics, and technical labels
Do keep the Archive Amber accent to ≤15% of any screen
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 for even line lengths
Do use clamp() for responsive display typography, never exceeding 4.5rem
Do maintain ≥4.5:1 contrast for body text and ≥3:1 for large text
Do use the grid-gap-px pattern for structured comparisons
donts: Don't use border-radius greater than 0px on any element (full-pill for tags/badges only)
Don't use box-shadow on any element
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as colored accent)
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, or translucent surfaces
Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted backgrounds
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent)
Don't use identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text)
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding
Don't use hand-drawn / sketchy SVG illustrations
Don't use decorative grid backgrounds (two-axis CSS grid overlays)
Don't look like generic SaaS landing pages, traditional DAM tools, playful AI tools, developer tooling, consumer AI companions, enterprise workflow software, stock SaaS aesthetic, NFT/Web3, or sci-fi
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as colored accent
Don't pair border: 1px solid X + box-shadow with blur ≥ 16px
